html:
Exclusive to:

“Use on Garden Soil to create dirt piles where survivors can plant seeds.”

-

The Garden Hoe is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted at a Science Machine with two Twigs and two Flint.

The Garden Hoe is used to move or destroy Farm Soil when used on a Farm Soil Turf. It has 25 uses.

The Gorge

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Gorge

The Hoe is a tool added in The Gorge event and used to loosen the soil in beds for further planting of seeds. It can be purchased from Swamp Pig Elder with 5 Logs.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Classy
Pantomimed Collection
Pantomimed Garden Hoe
Convey an incredibly convincing impression of a garden hoe.
Woven - Elegant
Farmhand Collection
Homespun Garden Hoe
It seems to have been left neglected for some time.

Trivia

  • The Garden Hoe and the Splendid Garden Hoe were introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Garden Hoe
"Till soil for crop seeds."
Combat
17
Object Info
Perk
Till Farm Soil.
Equipable
25 uses (Tilling)
Does not stack
Crafting
×2 ×2
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"farm_hoe"
Exclusive to:
“I have to make the ground more comfortable for the seeds.”
–Wilson
“Farming is so much work...”
–Willow
“Is to till soil for tiny seeds.”
–Wolfgang
“I must prepare the seeds for their burial.”
–Wendy
“TO BURY THE PLANT SOURCE CODES IN THE GROUND”
–WX-78
“Humans have cultivated crops since Neolithic times.”
–Wickerbottom
“Better get planting.”
–Woodie
“Am I to be reduced to a common farmhand?”
–Maxwell
“Tö bury thöse useless seeds deep in the gröund.”
–Wigfrid
“We need that to plant the seeds.”
–Webber
“I'd better get planting if I want some fresh ingredients.”
–Warly
“Tuck in babies”
–Wormwood
“Let's get to planting, then!”
–Winona
“I've about had my fill of tilling and toiling.”
–Wortox
“Make hole for baby plants.”
–Wurt
“We'll need that to plant seeds.”
–Walter
“Tilling is so tedious.”
–Wanda
“Use on Garden Soil to create dirt piles where survivors can plant seeds.”
-
The Garden Hoe is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted at a Science Machine with two Twigs and two Flint.
The Garden Hoe is used to move or destroy Farm Soil when used on a Farm Soil Turf. It has 25 uses.

"quagmire_hoe"
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: The Gorge
“It's a farming instrument.”
–Wilson
“You mean I gotta do work?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang must do farmwork for tastiest veggies.”
–Wolfgang
“To till the corrupt soil.”
–Wendy
“TILLING ADDON ACQUIRED”
–WX-78
“It can be used to till fertile soil.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's a farmer's life for me.”
–Woodie
“This is so very beneath me.”
–Maxwell
“Tis a farming weapön.”
–Wigfrid
“I know how to use this!”
–Webber
“Dirt comber”
–Wormwood
“I never done farmwork.”
–Winona
“To turn the soil, row by row.”
–Wortox
“Farming... thing!”
–Wurt
“It's a farming instrument.”
–Walter
“It's a farming instrument.”
–Wanda
The Hoe is a tool added in The Gorge event and used to loosen the soil in beds for further planting of seeds. It can be purchased from Swamp Pig Elder with 5 Logs.

It is crafted at a [[Science Machine]] with two [[Twigs]] and two [[Flint]]. The Garden Hoe is used to move or destroy [[Farm Soil]] when used on a [[Farm Soil|Farm Soil Turf]]. It has 25 uses. {{clear}} ==The Gorge== {{Object Infobox |name = Hoe |icon = Garden Hoe.png |image = Garden Hoe Dropped.png |description = Till soil for crop seeds. |equipslot = hands |durability = Infinity '''([[Tools#Tilling Tools|Tilling]])''' |soldBy = {{Pic32|Log/DST}}×5 ({{Pic32|Swamp Pig Elder}}) |spawnCode = "quagmire_hoe"}} {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}}{{Event|The Gorge}} {{Quotes |wilson = It's a farming instrument. |willow = You mean I gotta do work? |wolfgang = Wolfgang must do farmwork for tastiest veggies. |wendy = To till the corrupt soil. |wx78 = TILLING ADDON ACQUIRED |wickerbottom = It can be used to till fertile soil. |woodie = It's a farmer's life for me. |maxwell = This is so very beneath me. |wigfrid = Tis a farming weapön. |webber = I know how to use this! |winona = I never done farmwork. |wortox = To turn the soil, row by row. |wormwood = Dirt comber |wurt = Farming... thing! |walter = It's a farming instrument. |wanda = It's a farming instrument. |choose = wilson }} The '''Hoe''' is a tool added in [[The Gorge]] event and used to loosen the soil in beds for further planting of [[Packet of Seeds|seeds]]. It can be purchased from [[Swamp Pig Elder]] with 5 [[Log/DST|Logs]]. {{clear}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Tools Skins|Belongings}}
